title: Supervisor continuation
summary: The supervisor MUST continue each non-terminal run until the harness reaches an operator-owned or terminal pending action.
instructions: The supervisor MUST inspect `pending_action`, perform only that action, and re-check `pending_action` after every harness transition.
The supervisor MUST continue without operator handoff while `pending_action` is `prepare_invocation`, `invoke_agent`, or `supervisor_assessment`.

The supervisor MUST stop for operator input when `pending_action` is `operator_approval` or `operator_decision` only if the operator has not already supplied the needed decision in the active request. An explicit operator decision MUST be executed without asking for it again. Terminal `none` MUST be reported and stopped.
The supervisor MUST NOT ask the operator to resume a run while a supervisor-owned pending action remains.

The harness MUST pause for operator_decision after the same stage fails twice for the same hard-failure signature, independently of general stage-attempt and consecutive-failure limits. This applies to direct failure self-loops and governed indirect remediation loops.

When implementation loops to implementation, the supervisor MUST ensure the next coder invocation includes the prior failed output and deterministic evidence; it MUST NOT spend a retry on an unchanged paperwork-only resubmission.
